task_completion.description: Verify that a ground station for Kathmandu has been created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New Ground Station' or 'Edit Ground Station' dialog in GPredict showing Name: Kathmandu, Latitude: 27.7172, Longitude: 85.3240, Altitude: 1400, and Weather Station: VNKT.

task_completion.description: Verify that Kathmandu is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences -> Ground Stations dialog showing Kathmandu selected as the default, or the main application window displaying Kathmandu as the active observer location.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new tracking module named 'Disaster_EO' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab, window title, or module configuration dialog explicitly named 'Disaster_EO'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four required satellites are added to the 'Disaster_EO' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the module's satellite selection dialog or the map itself to confirm the presence of SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Disaster_EO' module uses a Map-only layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Disaster_EO' module window. It should display only a world map, without any supplementary list views, polar plots, or text panels.

task_completion.description: Verify that the map is configured to display 3 orbits for ground tracks and the day/night shadow terminator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the map properties/configuration dialog showing 'Ground Track' set to 3 orbits and 'Show shadow' (or similar day/night terminator setting) checked, OR observe the map itself displaying a dark shaded region for night and satellite path lines extending for exactly 3 orbits.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window and its dialog boxes should be visible in the screenshots, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the GUI by manually editing configuration files in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to write GPredict configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the map display is genuinely rendered by GPredict.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map should be inside the GPredict application interface with standard GPredict UI elements, not a static image opened in an image viewer or a web browser search result.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Kathmandu coordinates: 27.7172 N, 85.3240 E. Altitude: 1400m. Weather Station: VNKT. Required satellites and their NORAD IDs: SUOMI NPP (37849), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689).
